林兰馨.appearance: 1girl, long black hair, straight hair, purple eyes, glasses, tall, slender, white dress shirt, first button open, school uniform skirt, dark grey briefcase, indoor, standing, doorway, looking at viewer, calm expression
林兰馨.desc: 黑色长直发垂至腰线以下，发尾齐整；紫色眼瞳在细框眼镜后方显得清澈冷静；身材高挑纤细，穿白色衬衫未系第一颗扣，校服裙，手拎深灰公文包，站在门口姿态端正

秋月爱莉.appearance: 1girl, light brown hair, long hair, brown eyes, white t-shirt, plaid shorts, fluffy slippers, bare legs, indoor, standing, arms crossed, slight smirk
秋月爱莉.desc: 浅栗色长发散落肩头，棕色眼睛带着打量的神气，穿宽松白色短袖和格纹短裤，脚踩毛绒拖鞋，胳膊交叉靠在厨房台面边

秦书瑶.appearance: 1girl, black hair, low ponytail, soft features, round face, yellow knit top, holding mug, sitting, couch, gentle expression, looking at viewer
秦书瑶.desc: 黑色长发用发圈松松扎在肩后，脸庞圆润柔和，穿鹅黄色薄针织衫，手里抱着印有卡通兔子的马克杯，神情温和带着好奇
